name: Printnet Inc.
summary: Printnet Inc. provides offset and on-demand printing services. It offers magazine, flyer, poster, brochure, business card, post card, clear file, disc jacket, calendar, envelope, print slip, wrapping paper, bedding, scratch card, cover, floor sign, sign/panel, seal sticker, POP, and other printing services. The company was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Kagoshima, Japan.
